title: enforce blocking of registries
body:
Vendor in the latest c/image to enforce blocking of registries when
creating a c/image/docker.dockerClient.  Add integration tests to
avoid regressions.

Signed-off-by: Valentin Rothberg <rothberg@redhat.com>

---

~~Do not merge: that's a pet PR for https://github.com/containers/image/pull/658.~~

comments.body: Oups... please don't merge. We need to merge c/image first.
